Type Property# orientationDidChange

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+

```
static var orientationDidChange: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIDevice.OrientationDidChangeMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIDevice.OrientationDidChangeMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/orientationdidchange#see-also)
